pg87-p1-s1: What used to be the hunch or the occasional inspiration gradually becomes a working part of the mind.
pg87-p1-s2:
Being still
inexperienced and having just made conscious contact with God, it is not probable that we are going to be inspired at
all times.
pg87-p1-s3: We might pay for this presumption in all sorts of absurd actions and ideas.
pg87-p1-s4:
Nevertheless, we find that our
thinking will, as time passes, be more and more on the plane of inspiration.
pg87-p1-s5: We come to rely upon it.
pg87-p1:
What used to be the hunch or the occasional inspiration gradually becomes a working part of the mind. Being still
inexperienced and having just made conscious contact with God, it is not probable that we are going to be inspired at
all times. We might pay for this presumption in all sorts of absurd actions and ideas. Nevertheless, we find that our
thinking will, as time passes, be more and more on the plane of inspiration. We come to rely upon it.
pg87-p2-s1:
We usually conclude the period of meditation with a prayer that we be shown all through the day what our next step is to
be, that we be given whatever we need to take care of such problems.
pg87-p2-s2:
We ask especially for freedom from self-will, and
are careful to make no request for ourselves only.
pg87-p2-s3: We may ask for ourselves, however, if others will be helped.
pg87-p2-s4:
We are
careful never to pray for our own selfish ends.
pg87-p2-s5: Many of us have wasted a lot of time doing that and it doesn't work.
pg87-p2:
We usually conclude the period of meditation with a prayer that we be shown all through the day what our next step is to
be, that we be given whatever we need to take care of such problems. We ask especially for freedom from self-will, and
are careful to make no request for ourselves only. We may ask for ourselves, however, if others will be helped. We are
careful never to pray for our own selfish ends. Many of us have wasted a lot of time doing that and it doesn't work. You
can easily see why.
pg87-p3-s1: If circumstances warrant, we ask our wives or friends to join us in morning meditation.
pg87-p3-s2:
If we belong to a religious
denomination which requires a definite morning devotion, we attend to that also.
pg87-p3-s3:
If not members of religious bodies, we
sometimes select and memorize a few set prayers which emphasize the principles we have been discussing.
pg87-p3-s4:
There are many
helpful books also.
pg87-p3-s5: Suggestions about these may be obtained from one's priest, minister, or rabbi.
pg87-p3-s6:
Be quick to see where
religious people are right.
pg87-p3-s7: Make use of what they offer.
pg87-p3:
If circumstances warrant, we ask our wives or friends to join us in morning meditation. If we belong to a religious
denomination which requires a definite morning devotion, we attend to that also. If not members of religious bodies, we
sometimes select and memorize a few set prayers which emphasize the principles we have been discussing. There are many
helpful books also. Suggestions about these may be obtained from one's priest, minister, or rabbi. Be quick to see where
religious people are right. Make use of what they offer.
pg87-p4-s1: As we go through the day we pause, when agitated or doubtful, and ask for the right thought or action.
pg87-p4-s2:
We constantly
remind ourselves we are no longer
pg87-p4:
As we go through the day we pause, when agitated or doubtful, and ask for the right thought or action. We constantly
remind ourselves we are no longer
